name: Adel Kinnick-Feller Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Adel Kinnick-Feller Park Tennis Courts in Adel, IA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Des Moines Golf & Country Club
description: Des Moines Golf & Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Waukee, IA. There are 9 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 5 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, food, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and youth programming. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Members must reserve a court online at dmgcc.org, or in the DMGCC app.

name: Fox Creek Park Pickleball Courts
description: There are 4 dedicated pickleball courts and 4 shared with tennis using portable nets.

name: McCreary Community Center, Perry
description: Come play pickleball at McCreary Community Center, Perry in Perry, IA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, lights, locker rooms, water, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and food.

name: Waukee  Family YMCA
description: Waukee Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waukee, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights. Reservations are available.
